task.subject: LaneV cross-lane acceptance precheck
task.description: Using the published Lane0 manifest plus completed LaneA/LaneB/LaneC/LaneD outputs on leader HEAD, assemble the first cross-lane comparison snapshot and run an acceptance precheck. Produce a verifier artifact bundle that records completed lanes, pending gaps, whether any cosmetic env relaxation leaked into mainline, and what exact smoke/eval commands should run next. Prefer artifacts/scripts over code changes; only change verifier-owned files if strictly necessary.

mailbox_follow_up.instruction: Treat the user-provided native PPO run/checkpoint as the authoritative gold baseline and stop using the earlier failed local PPO smoke as the PPO floor.

completed_lane_summary.summary: Published the shared manifest, PPO control manifest, baseline provenance, and comparison template.
key_findings: Manifest was last refreshed on head 3406849 and is stale relative to current leader head 407660e.

completed_lane_summary.summary: Fixed FlashSAC LR warmup/decay scheduling to use interaction-step-derived update budgets after the real num_envs is observed.
verification_highlights: merged-head tracking smoke artifact still missing

completed_lane_summary.summary: Canonical evaluation overrides and zero-safe metric aggregation are on leader HEAD, and post-manifest validation produced a PASS-with-caution bundle.
verification_highlights: evaluate.py stays on canonical tracking thresholds
play.py still uses the relaxed inference helper, so acceptance-video semantics remain an explicit follow-up decision

completed_lane_summary.summary: Normalized runtime device metadata and recorded runtime.yaml device/buffer/amp settings during training; follow-up metadata integration also landed cleanly.
verification_highlights: Cartpole FlashSAC CPU smoke run passed

completed_lane_summary.summary: Added opt-in planar/height env-contract probes for counterexample measurement without changing default tracking config wiring.
verification_highlights: helpers are not referenced by default tracking config files
control lane remains non-promotable unless generic-alignment proof emerges

local_reproduction_commands.evaluate: cd "$OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD" && uv run evaluate-tracking Mjlab-Tracking-Flat-Unitree-G1 --checkpoint-file /home/ssy/ssy_files/mjlab/logs/rsl_rl/g1_tracking_handstand1/2026-04-14_12-19-21_handstand1_acrobatics_ft_40000/model_31500.pt --motion-file /home/ssy/ssy_files/mjlab/artifacts/motion_runs/handstand1_high/pipeline/mjlab/motion.npz --num-envs 4 --device cpu --output-file $OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD/.omx/logs/lanev-ppo-authoritative-baseline-eval.json

ppo_gold_baseline.comparison_guidance: Separate native PPO capability from local reproduced eval/play behavior in verifier notes and future FlashSAC comparisons.
ppo_gold_baseline.authoritative_train_command: canonical observed PPO run (reconstructed from saved params): cd "$OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD" && uv run train Mjlab-Tracking-Flat-Unitree-G1 --env.commands.motion.motion-file /home/ssy/ssy_files/mjlab/artifacts/motion_runs/handstand1_high/pipeline/mjlab/motion.npz --env.scene.num-envs 4096 --agent.max-iterations 40000 --agent.experiment-name g1_tracking_handstand1 --agent.run-name handstand1_acrobatics_ft_40000 --agent.seed 42 --agent.resume true --agent.load-run 2026-04-13_16-06-46_handstand1_high_seed42 --agent.load-checkpoint model_4999.pt

pending_gaps.detail: Shared manifest observed head 3406849fabb795c1438e842844318bc7bdf6dc18 but leader head is now 407660e91ad7468826c68990f3ea9ec017575f2c; refresh before using comparison hashes as current truth.
/home/ssy/ssy_files/mjlab/.omx/specs/flashsac_lane0/comparison-template.csv still contains only the header row even though LaneB post-manifest validation and LaneV PPO baseline bundles already exist.
Lane A and Lane C still lack merged-head tracking smoke/eval/play artifacts, so there is no mainline-candidate row to compare against the PPO floor.
Task 11 remains in progress: the local checkpoint+motion evaluate/play path still diverges from the authoritative native PPO success and must remain debug-only telemetry.

FlashSAC training overrides in src/mjlab/flashsac/config.py still widen anchor thresholds and drop ee_body_pos during training; this predates the follow-up lanes and remains a genericity risk to review during acceptance.

evidence: Task 8 post-manifest validation confirmed evaluate.py uses apply_tracking_evaluation_overrides() for both PPO and FlashSAC evaluation paths on leader HEAD.
The same validation also confirmed play.py still uses apply_flashsac_tracking_inference_overrides(), so acceptance-video semantics remain distinct from canonical evaluation semantics.
LaneD helper names still appear only in src/mjlab/tasks/tracking/mdp/{rewards,metrics,terminations}.py and their dedicated test; they are not referenced by default tracking config wiring.
The threshold widening and ee_body_pos removal in src/mjlab/flashsac/config.py already existed at baseline 2fc0c19, so they are not a new leak from LaneD or the evaluation refactor.

laneA-parity.label: Lane A upstream parity
laneA-parity.notes: First merged-head candidate that still needs tracking smoke evidence.
laneA-parity.smoke_train: cd "$OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD" && uv run train Mjlab-Tracking-Flat-Unitree-G1 --backend flashsac --registry-name <motion-artifact> --agent.seed 42 --agent.run-name laneA-parity-seed-42
laneA-parity.smoke_eval: cd "$OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD" && uv run evaluate-tracking Mjlab-Tracking-Flat-Unitree-G1 --backend flashsac --checkpoint-file <laneA-parity-seed-42-checkpoint-file> --motion-file <absolute-motion-npz> --num-envs 1024 --output-file $OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD/.omx/artifacts/flashsac_tracking/laneA-parity/seed-42/eval/eval.json
laneA-parity.smoke_play: cd "$OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD" && uv run play Mjlab-Tracking-Flat-Unitree-G1 --backend flashsac --checkpoint-file <laneA-parity-seed-42-checkpoint-file> --motion-file <absolute-motion-npz> --num-envs 1 --viewer viser --video

laneC-trainer-systems.label: Lane C trainer/systems
laneC-trainer-systems.notes: Second merged-head candidate if Lane A still fails or needs comparison coverage.
laneC-trainer-systems.smoke_train: cd "$OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD" && uv run train Mjlab-Tracking-Flat-Unitree-G1 --backend flashsac --registry-name <motion-artifact> --agent.seed 42 --agent.run-name laneC-trainer-systems-seed-42
laneC-trainer-systems.smoke_eval: cd "$OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD" && uv run evaluate-tracking Mjlab-Tracking-Flat-Unitree-G1 --backend flashsac --checkpoint-file <laneC-trainer-systems-seed-42-checkpoint-file> --motion-file <absolute-motion-npz> --num-envs 1024 --output-file $OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD/.omx/artifacts/flashsac_tracking/laneC-trainer-systems/seed-42/eval/eval.json
laneC-trainer-systems.smoke_play: cd "$OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD" && uv run play Mjlab-Tracking-Flat-Unitree-G1 --backend flashsac --checkpoint-file <laneC-trainer-systems-seed-42-checkpoint-file> --motion-file <absolute-motion-npz> --num-envs 1 --viewer viser --video

laneV-ppo-authoritative-debug-repro.label: Lane V authoritative PPO checkpoint local reproduction (debug-signal-only)
laneV-ppo-authoritative-debug-repro.notes: Do not use this command to lower the PPO floor; rerun only if task 11 needs fresh current-head reproduction evidence.
laneV-ppo-authoritative-debug-repro.smoke_eval: local reproduced path: cd "$OMX_TEAM_LEADER_CWD" && uv run evaluate-tracking Mjlab-Tracking-Flat-Unitree-G1 --checkpoint-file /home/ssy/ssy_files/mjlab/logs/rsl_rl/g1_tracking_handstand1/2026-04-14_12-19-21_handstand1_acrobatics_ft_40000/model_31500.pt --motion-file /home/ssy/ssy_files/mjlab/artifacts/motion_runs/handstand1_high/pipeline/mjlab/motion.npz --num-envs 4 --device cpu --output-file /home/ssy/ssy_files/mjlab/.omx/logs/lanev-ppo-authoritative-baseline-eval.json

next_actions: Refresh the Lane0 manifest on current leader HEAD before recording any new comparison rows.
Carry forward the user-provided native PPO run/checkpoint as the PPO gold baseline; do not schedule a replacement PPO smoke to set the floor.
Use the existing laneV local reproduced eval/play bundle only as shared-path debugging evidence until task 11 resolves.
Run merged-head tracking smoke/eval/play for LaneA and LaneC, then populate comparison rows under the refreshed manifest.
